_meta.source: City finance department publications. Each entry maps a city key to the parent state and a flat overlay rate.
_meta.schema: rate applied to ordinary income (W-2 + interest/dividends) after 401(k) reduction unless otherwise noted

nyc.notes: NYC personal income tax peaks at 3.876% on income above ~$50K MFJ; modeled as flat. Includes LTCG.

yonkers.notes: Yonkers resident surcharge is 16.75% of NY state tax — modeled here as approximate flat 1.65% of state-AGI for simplicity.

pittsburgh.notes: Pittsburgh resident EIT 3.0% combined city + school district.

portland_or.notes: Multnomah County PFA 1.5% over $200K MFJ + Metro SHS 1.0% over $200K MFJ; modeled as flat 2.4%.

kansas_city_mo.notes: Kansas City earnings tax 1.0% on wages.
